zh.lifeSummary: 當Pietro II Ruffo, Count of Catanzaro於1220年出生在義大利卡拉布里亞雷吉 卡拉布里亞西諾波利時，他的父親Sigerio Ruffo di Sinopoli22歲，母親Belladame Orsini22歲。他於1260年與Giovanna d'Aquino在西班牙可蒙尼達 瓦倫希亞納瓦倫西亞瓦利納希亞結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1302年在義大利卡拉布里亞卡坦扎羅卡坦扎羅享年82歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Pietro II Ruffo, Count of Catanzaro于1220年出生在意大利卡拉布里亞雷吉 卡拉布里亞西諾波利时，他的父亲Sigerio Ruffo di Sinopoli22岁，母亲Belladame Orsini22岁。他于1260年与Giovanna d'Aquino在西班牙可蒙尼達 瓦倫希亞納瓦倫西亞瓦利納希亞结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1302年在意大利卡拉布里亞卡坦扎羅卡坦扎羅享年82岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ruffo,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Antonio, Arturo, Attilio, Attillo, Carmelo, Carmine, Eduardo, Elena, Gustavo, Mario, Ofelia, Rafael, Roberto, Rocco.  Spanish Jose, Carmella, Juan, Raul.

from the personal name Ruffo, from Latin Rufus, originally a nickname for someone with red hair, from a dialect form of the standard Latin word rubeus. The name Rufus was borne by various minor early Christian saints.

variants.name: Ruffino
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Mariano, Santo, Vincenzo, Antonio, Mario, Rosario, Domenic, Filomena, Gasper, Italo, Sal, Vita.
Italian: from the personal name Ruf(f)ino, from Latin Rufinus, a development of Rufus (see Ruffo ).

variants.name: Ruffin
meanings: English and French: from the Old French personal name Ruffin, from Latin Rufinus, a diminutive of Rufus ‘red’, borne by several early Christian saints, including a 3rd-century martyr of Soissons and a 4th-century Church Father. Compare Ruffo .
English: nickname from Middle English ruffine (Old French rufin) ‘reddish’, for someone with red hair or a ruddy complexion.
English: possibly also a nickname from Middle English ruffin ‘fiend, devil’.

variants.name: La Ruffa
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Cesare, Eduardo, Italia, Silvio.
Italian (also Laruffa): probably a nickname for someone from a family with red hair (see Ruffo ).

variants.name: Rufo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Antonio, Mario, Gino, Nino, Pompeo, Rogelio, Romeo, Aldo, Alfonse, Antonino, Benigno, Carmella, Dino, Donato, Emilio, Fortunato, Franco, Giulio, Isidra, Julio, Lauro, Liliana, Onofre.

variants.name: Ruffolo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Luigi, Aldo, Emilio, Fiorino, Mario, Natale, Serafino, Antonio, Aurelio, Carmine, Duilio, Enrico, Erminio, Ernesto, Filomena, Gaspare, Lilia, Rodolfo, Rosario, Sergio.
Italian (Calabria): from a pet form of the personal name   Ruffo  .

nameMeanings.name: Pietro
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Piero
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Pietro II Ruffo, Count of Catanzaro was born in 1220, in Sinopoli, Reggio Calabria, Calabria, Italy, his father, Sigerio Ruffo di Sinopoli, was 22 and his mother, Belladame Orsini, was 22. He married Giovanna d'Aquino in 1260, in Valencia, Valencia, Valencian Community, Spain. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1302, in Catanzaro, Catanzaro, Calabria, Italy, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Pietro II Ruffo, Count of Catanzaro est né en 1220, à Sinopoli, Reggio Calabria, Calabria, Italie, son père, Sigerio Ruffo di Sinopoli, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Belladame Orsini, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Giovanna d'Aquino en 1260, à València, Valencia, Comunidad Valenciana, Espagne. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1302, à Catanzaro, Catanzaro, Calabria, Italie, à l’âge de 82 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Pietro II Ruffo, Count of Catanzaro 1220 in Sinopoli, Reggio Calabria, Calabria, Italien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sigerio Ruffo di Sinopoli 22 und seine Mutter Belladame Orsini 22. Er hat 1260 in València, Valencia, Comunidad Valenciana, Spanien Giovanna d'Aquino geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1302 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Catanzaro, Catanzaro, Calabria, Italien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Pietro II Ruffo, Count of Catanzaro è nato il nel 1220 nel Sinopoli, Reggio Calabria, Calabria, Italia, il suo padre, Sigerio Ruffo di Sinopoli, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Belladame Orsini, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Giovanna d'Aquino nel 1260, nel València, Valencia, Comunidad Valenciana, Spagna. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1302, nel Catanzaro, Catanzaro, Calabria, Italia, all'età di 82 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Pietro II Ruffo, Count of Catanzaroが1220年にイタリアカラブリアレグジオ カラブリアシノポリで生まれた時，父Sigerio Ruffo di Sinopoliは22歳，母Belladame Orsiniは22歳であった。1260年にスペインコムニダド ベレンシアナベレンシアヴァルeンシアでGiovanna d'Aquinoと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1302年にイタリアカラブリアカタンザロカタンザロで82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Pietro II Ruffo, Count of Catanzaro(이)가 1220년 이탈리아 캘라브리아 레조 캘라브리아 시노폴리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sigerio Ruffo di Sinopoli(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Belladame Orsini(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1260년 스페인 코먼이다드 발샤나 발샤 발e샤에서 Giovanna d'Aquino(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1302년 이탈리아 캘라브리아 카탠자로 카탠자로에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Pietro II Ruffo, Count of Catanzaro nasceu em 1220, em Sinopoli, Reggio Calabria, Calabria, Itália, seu pai, Sigerio Ruffo di Sinopoli, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Belladame Orsini, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Giovanna d'Aquino em 1260, em València, Valencia, Comunidad Valenciana, Espanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1302, em Catanzaro, Catanzaro, Calabria, Itália, com 82 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Pietro II Ruffo, Count of Catanzaro родился в 1220 г. в местности синополи, регио калабря, калабря, Италия, его отцу по имени Sigerio Ruffo di Sinopoli было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Belladame Orsini, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Giovanna d'Aquino в 1260 г. в местности валeнся, веиленся, комунидад веиленсяна, Испания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1302 г. в местности катанзаро, катанзаро, калабря, Италия в возрасте 82 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Pietro II Ruffo, Count of Catanzaro nació en 1220, en Sinopoli, Reggio Calabria, Calabria, Italia, su papá, Sigerio Ruffo di Sinopoli, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Belladame Orsini, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Giovanna d'Aquino en 1260, en Valencia, Valencia, Comunidad Valenciana, España. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1302, en Catanzaro, Catanzaro, Calabria, Italia, a la edad de 82 años.
